result:
The suite is green again — both tests pass.

The cause was a typo'd import in `stringutils.py:5`: it did `from helper import slugify`, but the module on disk is `helpers.py`. That `ModuleNotFoundError` fired at import time, so pytest couldn't even collect the tests — the entire suite failed regardless of test content. I changed the import to `from helpers import slugify` and ran the suite (via `uvx pytest`, since pytest isn't installed for the system Python): 2 passed.

One note: the environment has no pytest installed locally, which may be part of why the suite sat red unnoticed. If this project sticks around, adding a `requirements-dev.txt` or running tests through `uv` consistently would help.
